caption: Unit stats panel now renders the order QUEUE as an indented tree instead of a single line: the rear-move composite (from a move-to-rear order) shows 'MOVE' as the top row with an expand/collapse toggle, its ABOUT_FACE and MOVE children indented underneath, and the currently-active leaf highlighted in amber with a marker (ABOUT_FACE while turning, then the child MOVE row once the composite advances -- a second child row is inserted between them and reads 'MOVE:REFORM', becoming the active/highlighted leaf during the reform-before-move hold). A plain leaf order (no children) still renders as the single row it always has -- no extra chrome.
